title: Fix std::randomize() in static function with static class members (#7167)

features.name: std_randomize_inside_constraint_static_context
features.description: Code should include a std::randomize() call with a with clause containing an inside constraint, invoked from a static class function with static class member references

features.name: static_queue_class_member
features.description: Code should include a class with a static queue member of unbounded size

features.name: static_class_function
features.description: Code should include a static function defined within a class
